prompt:
Goal: editorial illustration for a programming textbook
Scene: A single input file "app.ts" (blue, on the left) enters a "tsc" compiler machine in the center. Three output conveyor belts emerge from the right side, each carrying a different file. Top belt: "app.js" (yellow) with a gear icon, labeled "runtime code - what runs in Node". Middle belt: "app.d.ts" (green) with a type icon, labeled "type declarations - for other TS consumers". Bottom belt: "app.js.map" (purple) with a map pin icon, labeled "source map - for debugging". Each output file has a distinct visual identity. The compiler machine shows which tsconfig flags enable each output: "declaration: true" and "sourceMap: true".
Style: Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational
Aspect ratio: 16:9
Background: white
Text in image: minimal or none
Avoid: photorealistic, dark, scary, complex UI screenshots
